summary.decision: The documented Snowflake SQL warehouse surface is stable-supported.
summary.basis: Real Snowflake validation completed through ContractForge commands and the hosted procedure/library-runner pattern, with Snowflake control-table evidence.
summary.scope_limit: Continuous ingestion, historical/snapshot soft delete and account-feature-dependent row access or masking policy certification are excluded from stable-final.

verification_commands.name: platform_parity_report
verification_commands.expected: portable signatures equal for shared Databricks/AWS/Snowflake scenarios

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_smoke_minimal
real_validation_projects.required_result: Five contracts complete with matching Snowflake control evidence.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_smoke_failure_paths
real_validation_projects.required_result: Failures write redacted evidence without exposing connection secrets.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_smoke_stage_publish
real_validation_projects.required_result: Published bundle loads from @stage and executes through the connector-backed runner.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_smoke_procedure
real_validation_projects.required_result: Hosted procedure deploys and runs one contract through the stable runner.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_smoke_task_graph
real_validation_projects.required_result: Live task graph deploys, root and dependent tasks reach SUCCEEDED, and bronze/silver counts match expected rows.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_usgs_rest_medallion
real_validation_projects.required_result: Frozen USGS payload produces matching logical counts across Databricks, AWS and Snowflake.

real_validation_projects.name: snowflake_hashdiff_production_benchmark
real_validation_projects.required_result: Snowflake hash-diff benchmark passes all required cases with query ids and control evidence.

same_contract_e2e.evidence_source: User-reported E2E execution of the same contracts with the same results on all three platforms.
same_contract_e2e.machine_check: tools.platform_parity.report keeps portable signatures equal and records allowed platform deltas.
same_contract_e2e.required_follow_up: Attach run ids, audit query outputs or CI artifact URLs when publishing a tagged release.

accepted_review_boundaries.reason: The reference production benchmark is validated; individual hash-diff contracts still carry a benchmark-required warning until workload-specific evidence is attached.

accepted_review_boundaries.area: row access policies and masking policies
accepted_review_boundaries.reason: The connected account returns Unsupported feature 'ROW ACCESS POLICY'. Table grants, comments/tags and validate-only governance remain supported; row access and masking policy certification are excluded from the stable-final claim for this account.
The stable surface covers table, SQL and staged-file batch sources. Snowpipe, Streams, Snowpipe Streaming and Kafka connector ingestion require a separate runtime/evidence mapping.
Historical modes are explicitly outside the Snowflake stable-final claim until Databricks/Snowflake parity evidence is attached.

do_not_claim: row access policy or masking policy support on accounts where the policy features are unavailable
Snowpipe, Streams, Snowpipe Streaming or Kafka connector equivalence
